mapper.sql: select t.*, tl.* from wf_task t left join wf_task_log tl on tl.taskId = t.id
mapper.update: UPDATE wf_task SET status = #{status}, finish_time = NOW() WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND status = 'TODO'
UPDATE wf_task SET status = #{toStatus}, action = #{action}, finish_time = NOW() WHERE node_instance_id = #{nodeInstanceId} AND status = #{fromStatus}
mapper.select: where t.del_flag = '0' and tl.del_flag = '0' and t.node_instance_id = #{nodeInstanceId}
